arts.ttl: Hansi Flick makes Lamine Yamal plea as Barcelona boss provides injury update ahead of Copa del Rey semi-final
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick makes a plea to match officials as his provides an injury update on Lamine Yamal ahead of Tuesday's Copa del Rey semi-final first leg against Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Barcelona suffer Lamine Yamal injury scare before Atletico Madrid semi-final
arts.sum: Barcelona forward Lamine Yamal reportedly did not take part in the team's final full training session before they host Atletico Madrid on Tuesday night, putting his involvement in the Copa del Rey semi-final very much in doubt. Yamal was not at his best during Barcelona's laboured trip to Las Palmas on Saturday night, often cutting a frustrated figure when faced with the hosts' robust approach to marking him.

arts.ttl: Can Pablo Barrios turn the page amid the shock of recent red cards?
arts.sum: A clumsy tackle seven minutes into the game against Celta Vigo handicapped the Rojiblancos, who needed an 81st-minute equalizer to salvage a point at home. Expected to return to the 11 on Tuesday night, Barrios will have to put his recent reds behind him.
